name: Add notification shortcut
description: Adds a notification shortcut button above quick write in the post list.

name: Add Packet Handler
description:
Adding the Loco Packet Handler allows external applications to handle the app's packets, which may compromise security.
Conflicts may occur on some systems.

name: Add Pine Lib
description: add libpine.so to the app's native libraries

name: Add settings
description: Adds a Morphe settings entry to the DCInside settings screen.

name: Add settings resources
description: Adds Morphe settings resources to the app.

name: Add settings resources
description: Adds Morphe settings layout resources to the app.

name: Add settings tab
description: Adds a settings tab to the app.

name: Add shared user ID
description: Adds or updates the sharedUserId attribute in the app's manifest. This allows multiple apps with the same sharedUserId to share data and run in the same process. Use with caution as this can affect app permissions and data isolation.

options.title: Shared User ID
options.description: The shared user ID to add to the app's manifest.

name: Adjust image download menu
description: Moves the image download menu buttons upward by adding bottom padding.

options.title: Bottom padding
options.description: Bottom padding in dp for the image download menu. The original value is 10dp.

name: Allow Hide on Any Chat
description: Users with hiding privileges can hide any chat, including their own messages.

name: Allow reply to feed
description: Allows replying to feed messages

name: Always Show Kick Button
description: Always shows the kick button in group member management.

name: Auto claim TongPow
description: Automatically claims CHZZK TongPow rewards when they become available while watching streams.

name: Bypass getText
description: Bypasses the integrity check for getText.

name: Bypass input mention limit in non-multichat
description: Bypass the limit of input mentions in non-multichat rooms

name: Bypass Moat check
description: Add a setting to bypass the Moat integrity check that can prevent KakaoPay from running.

name: Change model
description: Changes the device model to supporting subdevice features

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For DCinside only

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For KakaoTalk only

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Custom branding
description: Customize app branding (name and icon)

options.title: Custom app icon
options.description:
App icon source.

            Special values:
            - Original: Keep the original app icon.
            - Bundled: Use the bundled icon from patches/src/main/resources/custom-branding.

            Any other value is treated as a folder path with custom DCinside launcher icons.

            A custom icon folder must contain one or more of the following directories:
            - mipmap-mdpi
- mipmap-hdpi
- mipmap-xhdpi
- mipmap-xxhdpi
- mipmap-xxxhdpi

            Each icon directory must contain exactly one launcher icon file:
            - ic_launcher.png
- ic_launcher.webp

            The expected launcher icon sizes are:
            - mipmap-mdpi: 48x48 px
- mipmap-hdpi: 72x72 px
- mipmap-xhdpi: 96x96 px
- mipmap-xxhdpi: 144x144 px
- mipmap-xxxhdpi: 192x192 px

            Optionally, you can provide a notification icon as either:
            - drawable/ic_symbol.xml
            - drawable-<dpi>/ic_symbol.png or ic_symbol.webp with sizes:
            - drawable-mdpi: 24x24 px
- drawable-hdpi: 36x36 px
- drawable-xhdpi: 48x48 px
- drawable-xxhdpi: 72x72 px
- drawable-xxxhdpi: 96x96 px

name: Custom branding
description: Customize app branding (name)

name: Default external browser
description: Sets the default external browser for KakaoTalk to the system's default browser.

name: Dimens Patch
description: reassigns ad_minimum_height to 0dp to remove ads from the app.

name: Disable 300+ unread limit
description: Always show the real unread count instead of '300+' in chatroom list

name: Disable 99 unread limit
description: Skip the 99-cap so unread count shows full value

name: Disable ad controller
description: Disables the ad controller that manages ads in the app.

name: Disable chat room list ad
description: Disable the chat room list ad.

name: Disable ChatRoomAdController
description: Disables the open-link chat room BizBoard ad controller.

name: Disable Collapse Button
description: Disable collapse button on OpenChatList

name: Disable Comment Ad
description: Disables the comment ad in the app.

name: Disable Community Tab
description: Disables Community Tab

name: Disable DCCon loading
description: Adds settings to block DCCon image loading in posts and replies.

name: Disable Friend Feed tab
description: Disables the Friend Feed tab in KakaoTalk.

name: Disable Friend Lists ad
description: Disables the friend tab BizBoard ads in KakaoTalk.

name: Disable Image Ad
description: Disables the image ad in the app.

name: Disable open chat room comments
description: Adds a setting to disable comments in open chat rooms.

name: Disable OpenChat feed ad
description: Disables the OpenChat tab feed ad load and render paths.

name: Disable P2P
description: Disables CHZZK peer-assisted grid streaming and forces CDN playback.

name: Disable P2P
description: Disables SOOP peer-assisted grid streaming.

name: Disable Pay banner ad
description: Disables the KakaoPay banner ad load and render paths.

name: Disable S2Event
description: Disables Tracker

name: Disable SDK Tracker
description: Disables the SDK Tracker in KakaoTalk.

name: Disable Sentry
description: Disables Sentry error reporting in KakaoTalk.

name: Disable Sentry telemetry
description: Disables Sentry telemetry. See https://sentry.io/for/android/ for more information.

name: Disable ShortForm ad
description: Disables the shortform ad load and render paths.

name: Disable Talk Share Log
description: Disable talk share log

name: Disable update check
description: Disables the app's update check.

name: Disable verifying signature
description: Disables the signature verification check that prevents the app from running.

name: Enable Markdown
description: Render plain text messages with markdown-style formatting.

name: Enable OneStore feature
description: Enables the OneStore feature in DC Inside app.

name: Enable reaction mention flag
description: Enables the reaction mention flag in KakaoTalk chat logs.

name: Enable recording pause/resume feature
description: Enable recording pause/resume feature in KakaoTalk

name: Enable send big text
description: Allows sending big text messages in KakaoTalk.

name: Force enable debug mode
description: Enables debug mode in the app.

name: Force enable emoticon plus feature
description: Force enable emoticon plus feature (Unpurchased emoticon can be sent once per day)

name: Ghost Mode
description: Don't expose your typing status to the other party.

name: Hide DC official notices
description: Hides official DCInside operator notices from gallery notice lists.

name: Hide home components
description: Adds settings to hide selected DCInside home screen components.

name: Hide Main Ad
description: Hides the main ad in the app.

name: Hide mini gallery cover image
description: Adds a setting to hide the mini gallery cover image above post lists.

name: Hide More tab components
description: Adds options to hide components from the More tab.

name: Hide More tab Game tab
description: Hides the Game tab from the More tab.

name: Hook Package Manager
description: Hooks the Package Manager to bypass integrity checks.

name: Open profile from open chat feed
description: Opens open chat member profiles from join and leave feed messages.

name: Override feature flag
description: Overrides the feature flag to enable the feature.

options.title: Feature flag overrides
options.description: Enter feature flag overrides as semicolon-separated key=value pairs.

name: Play YouTube player in chat room
description: Allows playing YouTube videos in KakaoTalk chat rooms.

name: Register settings activity
description: Registers the Morphe settings activity in the app manifest.

name: Register settings activity
description: Registers the Morphe settings activity in the app manifest.

name: Remove BizBoard ads
description: Removes the BizBoard ad by forcing its dimensions to 0x0 and visibility to GONE in onMeasure.

name: Remove feed ad
description: Removes the feed ad from the app.

name: Remove focus ad
description: Removes the focus ad from the app.

name: Remove More tab ad
description: Removes the ad from the More tab.

name: Remove native ad
description: Removes the native ad from the app.

name: Remove OpenLink chat room list ad
description: Removes the OpenLink chat room list ad.

name: Remove shop tab
description: Removes the shop tab from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Remove Short-form Tab
description: Removes the Short-form tab from the now fragment.

name: Render big DCCon as normal size
description: Adds a setting to render big DCCon at normal DCCon size.

name: Restore old post icons
description: Adds a setting to restore DCInside 4.7.x post list and read footer icons.

name: Show chatroom channel ID
description: Shows the channel ID in chatroom settings and copies it when tapping the chat side title.

name: Show deleted, hidden, or edited messages
description: Allows you to see deleted, hidden, and edited message history in chat logs.

name: Spoof apk checksums
description: Spoofs the apk checksums to pass integrity checks.

name: Spoof App ID
description: Spoofs the App ID to bypass integrity checks. (to bypass biometric auth etc.)

name: Spoof Signature
description: Spoofs the app signature to bypass integrity checks.

name: Spoof signature
description: Spoofs the app signature to pass integrity checks.

name: Unlock Premium features
description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

name: Version info patch
description: Patches the version info to include '(ReVanced)' in the version string.
